$comment: Read-aloud prompts for the STT eval corpus. Each prompt IS the reference transcript, so no hand-transcription is needed. Terms are drawn from THIS repo on purpose: the whole hypothesis under test is that generic ASR mangles real code vocabulary. NOTE the known limitation, stated in README.md: read speech is cleaner than spontaneous dictation, so absolute WER will be optimistic — the RELATIVE ranking between engines is the signal we are after.

prompts.text: Run pnpm typecheck and then pnpm lint before pushing.
Open src slash main slash voiceIpc dot ts and find the session start handler.
The useVoiceCapture hook posts a frame message over the MessagePort.
createTtsRunner cancels the active synthesis when the epoch changes.
Push with no verify to skip the pre push end to end gate.
The sherpa onnx addon loads inside a utilityProcess, not the renderer.
Set contextIsolation to true and nodeIntegration to false.
Bump the schemaVersion and leave minReaderVersion alone for an additive change.
repairVoiceConfig coerces every field against the defaults.
The llmKeyStore encrypts each key with safeStorage before writing to userData.
Deepgram nova three takes linear sixteen at sixteen kilohertz mono.
Add a keyterm query parameter for each boosted term.
Run git rebase origin main before you open the pull request.
The zustand store lives in canvasStore dot ts under src renderer.
React Flow renders each board as a custom node.
node pty runs only in main and never in the renderer.
Call ipcRenderer dot invoke on the control plane channel.
The ttsBargeIn module filters echo with a bigram overlap check.
Set the environment variable CANVAS underscore DEV underscore TITLE before running pnpm dev.
electron builder unpacks the dot node natives out of the asar.
The vitest config declares four projects split by filename and extension.
Wrap the raw PCM in a forty four byte WAV header before uploading.
Groq whisper large v three turbo costs four cents an hour.
AssemblyAI takes a keyterms prompt of up to one thousand phrases.
The offline recognizer needs modified beam search for hotwords to apply.
Check the getUserMedia constraints and turn off aggressive noise suppression.
jarvisSession registers a final consumer while converse mode is live.
The pre push hook runs the windows leg only for renderer scoped changes.
Use write file atomic so a crash never truncates canvas dot json.
The kanban board exposes add card, move card, and update card.
